title: lippia alba var. lanceolata
intro: Lippia alba var. lanceolata, also known as Phyllis or Mexican oregano, is a plant species in the verbena family, native to Mexico and Central America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects, which are attributed to its essential oil content. The health benefits of Lippia alba var. lanceolata include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce stress levels. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
